AllowedHosts.description: Semicolon-separated list of allowed host headers. Use "*" to allow any host.

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.description: OTLP endpoint URL for OpenTelemetry traces, metrics, and logs (e.g. http://localhost:4040). Overridden by the OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT environment variable.

OTEL_SERVICE_NAME.description: Service name reported to OpenTelemetry (e.g. status). Overridden by the OTEL_SERVICE_NAME environment variable.

byakko-db.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Overridden automatically by Aspire.

localstack.description: LocalStack endpoint URL (e.g. http://localhost:4566). Overridden automatically by Aspire.

AutoMigrate.description: When true, EF Core migrations are applied automatically on startup via MigrationService.

HealthChecks.description: Health check endpoint URLs for each tracked service. An empty string disables the check and reports Unknown.

Api.description: URL of the API /health endpoint (e.g. https://api.byakko.dev/health).

Admin.description: URL of the Admin health endpoint (e.g. https://admin.byakko.dev/health.txt).

Portal.description: URL of the Portal health endpoint (e.g. https://byakko.dev/health.txt).

Authentication.description: URL of the Keycloak readiness endpoint (e.g. https://authentication.byakko.dev/).

Enabled.description: When false, the rate limiter middleware is not added to the pipeline. Should be false in Development and tests.

General.description: Global fixed-window limiter applied to all requests, partitioned by IP address.

PermitLimit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per window.

WindowInSeconds.description: Duration of the rate limiting window in seconds.

Mode.description:
S3-compatible storage provider.
- LocalStack: local development using static test/test credentials and us-east-1.
- OvhCloud: production object storage on OVH.

BucketName.description: Name of the S3 bucket used to store asset content.

AutoCreateBucket.description: When true, the bucket is created on startup if it does not exist.

OvhCloud.description: OVHCloud S3-compatible storage credentials. Required when Mode is OvhCloud.

AccessKey.description: OVHCloud S3 access key. Store securely — do not commit real credentials.

SecretKey.description: OVHCloud S3 secret key. Store securely — do not commit real credentials.

Username.description: SMTP authentication username. Leave empty to skip authentication (e.g. Mailpit).

TlsEnabled.description: Enables TLS/SSL encryption for the SMTP connection.

AdministratorFrom.description: Sender address used on outgoing administrator emails.

AdministratorTo.description: Recipient address for outgoing administrator emails.

Name.description: Display name shown in the email client.
